author: konard
body:
## Solution summary

The branch is clean and the attempt structure now validates successfully.

What I checked and fixed:
- Regenerated [`proofs/attempts/ATTEMPTS.md`](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1777018045597/proofs/attempts/ATTEMPTS.md) so entries are in alphabetical order, as requested by the issue comments.
- Verified the new Kardash attempt folder is complete with:
  - [`README.md`](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1777018045597/proofs/attempts/sergey-kardash-2011-peqnp/README.md)
  - [`ORIGINAL.md`](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1777018045597/proofs/attempts/sergey-kardash-2011-peqnp/ORIGINAL.md)
  - [`ORIGINAL.pdf`](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1777018045597/proofs/attempts/sergey-kardash-2011-peqnp/ORIGINAL.pdf)
  - [`proof/README.md`](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1777018045597/proofs/attempts/sergey-kardash-2011-peqnp/proof/README.md)
  - [`proof/lean/KardashProof.lean`](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1777018045597/proofs/attempts/sergey-kardash-2011-peqnp/proof/lean/KardashProof.lean)
  - [`proof/rocq/KardashProof.v`](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1777018045597/proofs/attempts/sergey-kardash-2011-peqnp/proof/rocq/KardashProof.v)
  - [`refutation/README.md`](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1777018045597/proofs/attempts/sergey-kardash-2011-peqnp/refutation/README.md)
  - [`refutation/lean/KardashRefutation.lean`](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1777018045597/proofs/attempts/sergey-kardash-2011-peqnp/refutation/lean/KardashRefutation.lean)
  - [`refutation/rocq/KardashRefutation.v`](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1777018045597/proofs/attempts/sergey-kardash-2011-peqnp/refutation/rocq/KardashRefutation.v)
- Ran `python3 scripts/check_attempt_structure.py --path proofs/attempts/sergey-kardash-2011-peqnp` and it passed.
- Ran `git diff --check` and it passed.

One important note:
- The PR’s merge state was `DIRTY` before I started, but the local working tree is now clean. If GitHub still reports conflicts, the remaining issue is likely remote merge-state metadata rather than unresolved local files.

I did not push or update the PR status yet. If you want, the next step is to refresh PR 548 and clear draft/ready state once GitHub’s mergeability status updates.

---
